## Type of change
- [ ] feat / fix / docs / chore / test / refactor / ci
- [ ] Evidence-grading / honesty impact (does this change what we claim?)

## Checklist
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `bioresearch doctor` passes
- [ ] No controlled-access data (ADNI / UKB-PPP / MetaBrain / deCODE) added
- [ ] No arXiv / bioRxiv / submission-prep material added (see .gitignore)
- [ ] Conventional commit message used
- [ ] Updated RELEASE_NOTES.md (if user-facing)
